problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Epigenetic. Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
